calendar.matters:
Mo To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Disco
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint R.B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to appoint a receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Continued To Sep-19-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
